chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 634 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2087/20213 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents-SMC >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. This is an old matter pending on the file of this Court since, 2013. On 27-05-2025, Counsel for the Petitioner was present and sought time, hence on his request, as last chance matter was adjourned for 19-08- 2025, when on that date by consent matter was adjourned for today. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
